title: RTL/LTR Handling in React — The Complete Guide
short-description: A practical guide to building fully bidirectional (AR/EN) React apps with proper RTL/LTR support using CSS logical properties and i18next.

title: Core Web Vitals Optimization: LCP & CLS in Real Projects
short-description: Real-world techniques I used to improve LCP and CLS scores in a Magento PWA and Next.js app — not just theory.
